data.description:
## Context
A project pins trusted-environment public keys out-of-band (never the tickets branch) and may require a specific environment's certificate for a gate; the check verifies against the pinned key, not the certificate's self-claimed keyid.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] A config pins trusted-environment public keys from an out-of-band, review-gated path (NOT the tickets branch).
- [ ] A cert from an environment not in the pinned set fails the required-environment check (test).
- [ ] The check verifies against the pinned key, never the certificate's self-claimed `key_id` (test).
data.title: op-cert: out-of-band trusted-environment key config + required-environment policy
